[new_med_skin] B2 — Exhausted slots: agent asks for alternative day
[new_med_skin] B3 — Morning selected: first-and-last slot pair offered (STEP 9)
[new_med_skin] B4 — Unavailable time: nearest-pair alternative offered
[new_med_skin] C1 — Time confirmed: CONFIRMATION spoken + universal_router confirm_time
[new_med_skin] C2 — No-availability retry: new timeframe triggers availability tool
[new_med_skin] D1 — ASAP timeframe: availability tool called find_next_available
[new_med_skin] D2 — Specific day: availability tool called with slots detail
[new_med_skin] E1 — No timeframe: agent asks when
[new_med_skin] E3 — Abandon availability: universal_router called
[new_med_skin] E4 — Service pivot escape: universal_router change_service
[new_med_skin] E5 — Practitioner change: universal_router change_practitioner
[new_med_skin] E6 — Time change: universal_router change_time
[new_med_skin] E7 — Location change: universal_router change_location
[new_med_skin] E8 — Multiple changes: universal_router multiple_changes
[new_med_skin] M1 — Multi-pract with first_available: slot offer, no preference question
[new_med_skin] M2 — Multi-pract: 'next available' triggers direct CONFIRMATION
[new_med_skin] M3 — Multi-pract no first_available: preference question at STEP 5
[new_med_skin] M4 — Multi-pract: named practitioner stored, continues
[new_med_skin] M5 — Ambiguous practitioner name: disambiguation question
[new_med_skin] M6 — Single practitioner: no preference question, slot offer
[new_med_skin] S7A — STEP 7 no-match + first_available: proactive offer made
[new_med_skin] S7B — S7 caller confirms proactive offer: CONFIRMATION + universal_router
[new_med_skin] S7C — S7 caller names specific time: agent reads slot from Tuesday afternoon
[new_med_skin] S7D — S7 relative earlier signal: morning band selected, morning slots offered
[new_med_skin] S7E — S7 general decline: clarifying question asked
[new_med_skin] S7F — S7 different day named (Saturday): slots offered without smart_router
